name: Mushroom Risotto
tagline: Carnaroli risotto with cremini, porcini, parmesan, butter
highlight: Dried porcini broth gives forest-floor depth, no eggs

hero.alt: Mushroom risotto with seared mushrooms and parmesan
hero.caption: mushroom risotto — porcini-deep

healthFacts: Mushrooms are one of few plant sources of vitamin D when sun-exposed.
Porcini are rich in umami glutamates — savory boost without meat.

steps.title: Steep the porcini
steps.detail: Rinse porcini, soak in hot water 15 minutes. Drain and chop, reserving the steeping liquid (strain through cloth to catch grit).
steps.tip: Porcini liquor is the secret weapon — never throw it out.

steps.title: Sear the cremini
steps.detail: Heat 2 tbsp butter over high. Sear cremini in batches until deeply browned, 6 minutes per batch. Set aside.
steps.tip: High heat, no salt yet — salt pulls water and steams instead of browning.

steps.title: Toast and ladle
steps.detail: Sweat onion 4 min. Add rice, toast 2 min. Wine, then porcini-liquid + stock by ladle, stirring, ~18 minutes total. Stir in chopped porcini halfway.
steps.tip: Don't add cold stock — it shocks the rice. Keep the stock warming on a back burner.

steps.title: Mantecare and top
steps.detail: Off heat, beat in remaining butter and parmesan. Top each bowl with seared cremini and thyme.
steps.tip: Should ripple into a wave when you shake the bowl — that's all'onda, the wave.
